hero.title: The barber chair as a public front door.
hero.description: The show translates Cypher of Healing into a visible, shareable experience. It is where grooming, conversation, culture, and reflection meet in public view.

featuredEpisode.title: Episode 01 — The Chair and the Father Wound
featuredEpisode.description: A client enters the chair carrying silence around his father. The conversation stays grounded in dignity, grooming, and the question of what men inherit before they ever choose for themselves.
featuredEpisode.ctaLabel: Book the kind of conversation this points toward

formatPoints: A client enters the chair and a real theme is named.
The service unfolds with dignity, rhythm, and conversation.
The episode stays grounded in reflection, not spectacle.
Each conversation ends with a clear Cipher takeaway.
guardrails: The show is educational and reflective, not therapy.
Conversations should honor consent, dignity, and non-exploitative storytelling.
The point is restoration and understanding, not emotional performance.
Every episode should route viewers into a next step inside the wider ecosystem.

episodeSeeds.title: The Chair and the Father Wound
episodeSeeds.takeaway: Naming what was inherited is often the first act of restoration.

episodeSeeds.title: Why Men Perform Strength Instead of Practice It
episodeSeeds.takeaway: Discipline without reflection becomes armor instead of growth.

episodeSeeds.title: Style, Dignity, and the Outer Reflection
episodeSeeds.takeaway: How you carry yourself can reinforce what you believe about your worth.
